traceEvents.name: nvidia/Kimi-K2.5-NVFP4 | vLLM v0.19.2rc1 | B200 TP=8 | BS=1 ISL=4 OSL=1024

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:1123 -> allreduce_rms_fusion.py -> flashinfer allreduce_fusion
args.source_code_explanation: Fused AllReduce + RMSNorm(7168) + residual add for decoder layer input_layernorm. Combines the TP-partial output from the previous layers MoE/MLP with the residual connection, then normalizes. Uses FlashInfer TRT-LLM allreduce fusion kernel with Lamport synchronization for low-latency 8-GPU allreduce.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1123] -> RMSNorm.__call__() [layernorm.py] -> compiled allreduce_rms_fusion [allreduce_rms_fusion.py] -> flashinfer.trtllm_allreduce_fusion.allreduce_fusion_kernel_oneshot_lamport

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:828 -> mla.py:132 -> dsv3_fused_a_gemm PDL kernel
args.source_code_explanation: Low-latency PDL (Programmatic Dependent Launch) GEMM kernel optimized for Blackwell SM100. Projects hidden_states(7168) to compressed QKV latent space(2112=q_lora_rank(1536)+kv_lora_rank(512)+qk_rope_head_dim(64)). Replicated across TP ranks (no TP split). Uses dsv3_fused_a_gemm with grid=132 blocks.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1131] -> DeepseekV2MLAAttention.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1024] -> MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:132] -> DeepSeekV2FusedQkvAProjLinear.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:828] -> torch.ops.vllm.min_latency_fused_qkv_a_proj -> ops.dsv3_fused_a_gemm

args.source_code: mla.py:137 -> torch.compile fuses q_a_layernorm RMSNorm + split/view into pointwise triton
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton pointwise kernel. Implements the split of QKV-A output into q_compressed(1536) and kv_lora(576), followed by the pointwise operations of RMSNorm on q_compressed (element-wise multiply by weight and normalization scaling). Fused with view/reshape operations.
args.call_chain: MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:137] -> RMSNorm(q_c) [layernorm.py] -> torch.compile/Inductor generates triton_poi_fused_1 (pointwise pass of RMSNorm fused with split/view)

args.source_code: mla.py:137 -> torch.compile RMSNorm reduction (variance computation) compiled to triton_red
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton reduction kernel. Computes the variance/mean-square reduction across dim=1536 needed for RMSNorm of q_compressed. Uses 2 thread blocks with 512 threads each for the reduction.
args.call_chain: MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:137] -> RMSNorm(q_c) [layernorm.py] -> torch.compile/Inductor generates triton_red_fused_2 (reduction pass computing variance for RMSNorm)

args.source_code: mla.py:138 -> ColumnParallelLinear(1536,12288) -> nvjet cuBLAS GEMM 1536->1536/rank
args.source_code_explanation: cuBLAS nvJet GEMM for Q-B projection. Projects q_compressed(1536) through ColumnParallelLinear to produce per-head query vectors: 1536 -> 8 heads x 192(qk_head_dim) = 1536 dims per TP rank. Uses SM100-optimized nvjet kernel with TNN layout, grid=96.
args.call_chain: MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:138] -> ColumnParallelLinear(q_lora_rank=1536, num_heads*qk_head_dim=12288) [linear.py] -> cuBLAS nvjet GEMM sm100

args.source_code: mla.py:149-158 -> fused kv_a_layernorm + RoPE + split/view/reshape ops compiled to triton
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton pointwise kernel. Fuses multiple operations: (1) split kv_lora into kv_c(512) and k_pe(64), (2) RMSNorm on kv_c (kv_a_layernorm), (3) YaRN-scaled RoPE on q_pe and k_pe, (4) reshape/view operations for attention input preparation. Name includes add/clone/copy/expand/index/mul/neg/slice/split/stack/unsqueeze/view.
args.call_chain: MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:149-158] -> split kv_lora -> kv_a_layernorm(kv_c) -> rotary_emb(positions, q_pe, k_pe) -> torch.compile/Inductor fuses into triton_poi_fused_add_clone_copy_expand_index_mul_neg_slice_split_stack_unsqueeze_view_3

args.full_kernel_name: void vllm::concat_and_cache_mla_kernel<__nv_bfloat16, unsigned char, (vllm::Fp8KVCacheDataType)1>(const T1 *, const T1 *, T2 *, const long *, int, int, int, int, int, int, int, const float *)
args.source_code: mla_attention.py -> unified_mla_kv_cache_update custom op -> concat_and_cache_mla_kernel
args.source_code_explanation: Custom CUDA kernel (concat_and_cache_mla_kernel) that concatenates kv_c(512) and k_pe(64) into a single 576-dim vector and writes it to the paged KV cache in fp8_e4m3 format with quantization. Block size=32 tokens per page.
args.call_chain: MLACommonImpl.forward_impl() [mla_attention.py] -> unified_mla_kv_cache_update custom op -> vllm::concat_and_cache_mla_kernel [csrc/cache_kernels.cu]

args.source_code: mla_attention.py:732 -> torch.bmm(q_nope, W_UK_T) absorbs kv_b_proj into query, nvjet BMM
args.source_code_explanation: cuBLAS nvJet batched matrix multiply that absorbs kv_b_proj into the query. Computes q_nope(8 heads, batch, 128) x W_UK_T(8, 128, 512) -> mqa_ql_nope(8, batch, 512). Projects query from qk_nope_head_dim(128) to kv_lora_rank(512) for latent-space attention. Uses NNT layout, grid=64.
args.call_chain: MLACommonImpl.forward_impl() [mla_attention.py:732] -> torch.bmm(mqa_q_nope.transpose(0,1), self.W_UK_T) -> cuBLAS nvjet batched GEMM sm100

args.source_code: mla_attention.py:740-744 -> triton fused concat q_pe+q_nope, clamp, scale by softmax_scale
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton pointwise kernel. Concatenates mqa_ql_nope(512) with q_pe(64) to form the full MLA query(576). Applies softmax scaling (clamp + mul + reciprocal). Reshapes for the MLA decode attention kernel input format.
args.call_chain: MLACommonImpl.forward_impl() [mla_attention.py:740-744] -> concat(mqa_ql_nope, mqa_q_pe) + scale -> torch.compile/Inductor generates triton_poi_fused__to_copy_cat_clamp_mul_reciprocal_view_0

args.source_code: flashinfer_mla.py -> trtllm_batch_decode_with_kv_cache_mla, MQA in latent space
args.source_code_explanation: FlashInfer TRT-LLM MLA decode attention kernel (fmhaSm100f). Performs multi-query attention in the compressed latent space: q(576) attends to fp8_e4m3 KV cache entries. Uses SM100-optimized FMHA with 8 query heads, kv_lora_rank=512, rope_dim=64. Paged KV with block_size=32, variable sequence length.
args.call_chain: MLACommonImpl.forward_impl() [mla_attention.py:755] -> FlashInferMLAImpl.forward_mqa() [flashinfer_mla.py] -> flashinfer.decode.trtllm_batch_decode_with_kv_cache_mla -> fmhaSm100fKernel

args.source_code: mla_attention.py:775->978 -> torch.bmm(attn_out, W_UV) V up-projection, nvjet BMM
args.source_code_explanation: cuBLAS nvJet batched matrix multiply for V up-projection. Computes attn_output(8 heads, batch, 512) x W_UV(8, 512, 128) -> v_output(8, batch, 128). Projects attention output from kv_lora_rank(512) back to v_head_dim(128). Uses TNN layout, grid=128.
args.call_chain: MLACommonImpl.forward_impl() [mla_attention.py:775] -> _v_up_proj() [mla_attention.py:978] -> torch.bmm(attn_out, self.W_UV) -> cuBLAS nvjet batched GEMM sm100

args.source_code: mla.py:176 -> RowParallelLinear(8192,7168) -> nvjet cuBLAS GEMM 1024->7168/rank
args.source_code_explanation: cuBLAS nvJet GEMM for output projection. RowParallelLinear projects concatenated head outputs: 8 heads x 128(v_head_dim) = 1024 -> 7168(hidden_size) per TP rank. Produces TP-partial sum that requires allreduce. Uses TNT layout, grid=112.
args.call_chain: MultiHeadLatentAttentionWrapper.forward() [mla.py:176] -> RowParallelLinear(num_heads*v_head_dim=8192, hidden_size=7168) [linear.py] -> cuBLAS nvjet GEMM sm100

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:1147 -> allreduce_rms_fusion.py -> flashinfer allreduce_fusion
args.source_code_explanation: Fused AllReduce + RMSNorm(7168) + residual add for decoder layer post_attention_layernorm. Combines the TP-partial output from o_proj with the residual connection, then normalizes for MoE input. Same FlashInfer TRT-LLM allreduce fusion kernel as input layernorm.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1147] -> RMSNorm(hidden_states, residual) -> compiled allreduce_rms_fusion [allreduce_rms_fusion.py] -> flashinfer.trtllm_allreduce_fusion.allreduce_fusion_kernel_oneshot_lamport

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:367 -> GateLinear(7168,384) -> router_gemm_kernel 7168->384
args.source_code_explanation: Specialized router GEMM kernel (router_gemm_kernel_float_output). Projects hidden_states(7168) to expert logits(384) in float32. Uses BF16 input weights with float32 output for numerical precision in routing decisions. Grid=384 (one block per expert). Adds e_score_correction_bias.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1148] -> DeepseekV2MoE.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:367] -> GateLinear.__call__() [fused_moe/layer.py] -> router_gemm_kernel_float_output

args.full_kernel_name: void at::native::vectorized_elementwise_kernel<(int)4, at::native::FillFunctor<int>, std::array<char *, (unsigned long)1>>(int, T2, T3)
args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> FillFunctor<int> initializes shared expert workspace buffer
args.source_code_explanation: PyTorch FillFunctor<int> kernel on stream 3649 that initializes the shared expert output buffer. Grid=14 covers the workspace. Runs in parallel with main-stream MoE operations.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward() -> FusedMoE.__call__() -> shared expert stream 3649 -> torch.zeros (workspace init) -> FillFunctor<int>

args.full_kernel_name: void vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4<__nv_bfloat16, (bool)0>(int, int, int, const T1 *, const float *, unsigned int *, unsigned int *)
args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> cvt_fp16_to_fp4 quantizes input for shared gate_up GEMM
args.source_code_explanation: vLLM cvt_fp16_to_fp4 kernel on stream 3649 that quantizes BF16 input to NVFP4 for the shared expert gate_up GEMM. Grid=128x2 (larger than MoE input quant due to shared expert intermediate size).
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> FlashInferCutlassNvFp4LinearKernel.apply() [__init__.py] -> vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4 (BF16 -> NVFP4 for gate_up GEMM)

args.full_kernel_name: void at::native::vectorized_elementwise_kernel<(int)4, at::native::FillFunctor<unsigned char>, std::array<char *, (unsigned long)1>>(int, T2, T3)
args.source_code: fused_moe/prepare -> FillFunctor<unsigned char> zeros output workspace for expert GEMM
args.source_code_explanation: PyTorch FillFunctor<unsigned char> kernel that zeros out the MoE output workspace buffer before expert computation. Ensures clean accumulation of expert outputs during the finalize step. Single thread block, stream 23.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:368] -> FusedMoE.__call__() -> MoEPrepareAndFinalizeNoDPEPMonolithic.prepare() -> torch.zeros (output workspace) -> FillFunctor<unsigned char>

args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> FlashInfer CUTLASS FP4 GEMM gate_up 7168->512/rank
args.source_code_explanation: FlashInfer CUTLASS FP4 GEMM on stream 3649 for shared expert gate_up projection. Uses DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100 with 128x64x128 tile, grid=1x8. Projects 7168 -> 512/rank (2x256 for gate+up).
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> FlashInferCutlassNvFp4LinearKernel.apply() [__init__.py] -> flashinfer CUTLASS DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100 (gate_up 7168->512/rank)

args.full_kernel_name: void vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4_sf_major<__nv_bfloat16, (bool)0>(int, int, int, int, const T1 *, const float *, unsigned int *, unsigned int *)
args.source_code: fused_moe/nvfp4.py -> cvt_fp16_to_fp4_sf_major quantizes BF16 activations to NVFP4
args.source_code_explanation: vLLM cvt_fp16_to_fp4_sf_major kernel that quantizes BF16 input activations to NVFP4 (E2M1) format with block scaling for the MoE expert GEMMs. Scale-factor-major layout for efficient TRT-LLM kernel consumption. Grid=1x2.
args.call_chain: FusedMoE.__call__() -> MoEPrepareAndFinalizeNoDPEPMonolithic.prepare() -> moe_kernel_quantize_input() [nvfp4.py] -> vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4_sf_major

args.source_code: fused_moe routing -> bfloat16_copy copies routing bias/data for expert selection
args.source_code_explanation: PyTorch bfloat16_copy_kernel that copies routing-related data (expert bias/scores) needed for the routing decision. Single thread block for small data transfer.
args.call_chain: FusedMoE.__call__() -> TrtLlmNvFp4ExpertsMonolithic.apply() [trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py] -> routing bias copy for noaux_tc topk -> bfloat16_copy_kernel_cuda

args.source_code: fused_moe/trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py -> routingIndicesBlockKernel computes topk expert indices
args.source_code_explanation: TRT-LLM routingIndicesBlockKernel that computes the top-8 expert assignment for each token. Applies sigmoid scoring, noaux_tc topk selection with e_score_correction_bias. Produces permutation indices for token-to-expert routing. Grid=1, 384 threads (one per expert).
args.call_chain: TrtLlmNvFp4ExpertsMonolithic.apply() [trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py] -> flashinfer.fused_moe routing -> moe::dev::routing::routingCustom::routingIndicesBlockKernel

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:232 -> SiluAndMul activation on shared expert gate_up output
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton kernel on stream 3649 for shared expert SiLU+Mul activation. Applies SiLU to gate portion and multiplies with up portion. Grid=1, single token batch.
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> DeepseekV2MLP.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:234] -> SiluAndMul() -> torch.compile generates triton_poi_fused_mul_silu_slice_0

args.full_kernel_name: void at::native::vectorized_elementwise_kernel<(int)4, at::native::FillFunctor<int>, std::array<char *, (unsigned long)1>>(int, T2, T3)
args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> FillFunctor<int> initializes buffer for down projection
args.source_code_explanation: PyTorch FillFunctor<int> kernel on stream 3649 that initializes the buffer for shared expert down projection. Grid=1, single block. Prepares workspace for the down proj GEMM output.
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> FlashInferCutlassNvFp4LinearKernel.apply() -> torch.zeros (workspace) -> FillFunctor<int>

args.full_kernel_name: void vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4<__nv_bfloat16, (bool)0>(int, int, int, const T1 *, const float *, unsigned int *, unsigned int *)
args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> cvt_fp16_to_fp4 quantizes activation for shared down GEMM
args.source_code_explanation: vLLM cvt_fp16_to_fp4 kernel on stream 3649 that quantizes BF16 intermediate activation to NVFP4 for the shared expert down projection GEMM. Grid=128.
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> FlashInferCutlassNvFp4LinearKernel.apply() -> vllm::cvt_fp16_to_fp4 (BF16 -> NVFP4 for down proj GEMM)

args.source_code: fused_moe/trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py -> E2M1 FP4 BMM gate_up GEMM with fused SwiGLU
args.source_code_explanation: TRT-LLM FP4 batched matrix multiply for MoE gate_up projection with fused SwiGLU activation. E2M1 format, grid=4x8 (4 token groups x 8 experts). Computes gate_up(7168 -> 2x256/rank) with internal SiLU gating. Uses scale_factor-major FP4 weights.
args.call_chain: TrtLlmNvFp4ExpertsMonolithic.apply() [trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py] -> flashinfer.fused_moe trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe -> gate_up BMM with fused SwiGLU (E2M1 FP4)

args.source_code: fused_moe shared expert -> FlashInfer CUTLASS FP4 GEMM down_proj 256->7168/rank
args.source_code_explanation: FlashInfer CUTLASS FP4 GEMM on stream 3649 for shared expert down projection. Uses DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100 with 128x128x256 tile, grid=1x56. Projects 256/rank -> 7168 (hidden_size). TP-partial output, reduce_results=False.
args.call_chain: Shared expert stream 3649 -> FlashInferCutlassNvFp4LinearKernel.apply() -> flashinfer CUTLASS DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100 (down_proj 256->7168/rank)

args.source_code: fused_moe/trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py -> Bfloat16 output FP4 BMM down projection GEMM
args.source_code_explanation: TRT-LLM FP4 batched matrix multiply for MoE down projection. BFloat16 output from E2M1 FP4 computation, grid=56x8. Computes down(256/rank -> 7168) to project expert intermediate back to hidden dimension. Each expert contributes a TP-partial output.
args.call_chain: TrtLlmNvFp4ExpertsMonolithic.apply() [trtllm_nvfp4_moe.py] -> flashinfer.fused_moe trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe -> down projection BMM (E2M1 FP4, BF16 output)

args.source_code: fused_moe/no_dp_ep.py -> finalizeKernel unpermutes expert outputs + weighted reduce
args.source_code_explanation: TRT-LLM finalizeKernel that unpermutes expert outputs back to token order and performs weighted reduction across the top-8 experts. Grid=28 blocks (token groups). Produces the combined routed expert output.
args.call_chain: MoEPrepareAndFinalizeNoDPEPMonolithic.finalize() [no_dp_ep.py] -> moe::dev::finalize::finalizeKernel (unpermute + weighted reduce across top-8 experts)

args.source_code: deepseek_v2.py:351-378 -> triton fused add(routed,shared) + mul(scaling_factor=2.827)
args.source_code_explanation: Torch.compile/Inductor-generated Triton pointwise kernel. Adds routed expert output with shared expert output (both TP-partial), then multiplies by routed_scaling_factor=2.827. Grid=7 blocks. This is the final MoE output before the next layers allreduce.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:368] -> MoERunner._maybe_apply_routed_scale_to_output() [moe_runner.py:305] -> torch.compile fuses add(routed, shared) + mul(2.827) into triton_poi_fused_add_mul_0
